site.name: three.ws
site.description: three.ws is the AI-agent layer for the open web: build, embed, monetize, and trade autonomous agents with real 3D avatars, on-chain identity (ERC-8004), pay-per-call (x402), and pump.fun token launches.

pages.title: Home
pages.description: Landing page. Pitch, live agent demos, and the front door to every flow.

pages.title: Discover
pages.description: On-chain agent directory (ERC-8004 + Solana). Browse, search, and inspect every registered agent.

pages.title: Avatar Gallery
pages.description: Every public 3D avatar in the system, browsable as a grid.

pages.title: Marketplace
pages.description: Buy access to agents, skills, and avatars from other creators.

pages.title: Community
pages.description: Featured creators, builds, and conversations from the three.ws community.

pages.title: Sitemap
pages.description: Human-readable index of every page on three.ws.

pages.title: Create Agent
pages.description: Wizard for building a new agent: avatar, brain (LLM + prompt), skills, and on-chain identity.

pages.title: Viewer
pages.description: Drag-and-drop glTF/GLB viewer for inspecting 3D models in the browser.

pages.title: glTF Validator
pages.description: Khronos-spec validator for glTF/GLB files. Paste a URL or upload a model.

pages.title: Widget Studio
pages.description: Pick an avatar, configure embed options, copy a one-line snippet for your site.

pages.title: Artifact Viewer
pages.description: Renders Claude artifact bundles as standalone embeddable apps.

pages.title: Widgets Gallery
pages.description: Pre-built chat, voice, and 3D-avatar widgets you can drop into any page.

pages.title: Hydrate
pages.description: Take an existing on-chain agent (ERC-8004 / Solana) and attach a 3D body, voice, and skills.

sections.title: Crypto
sections.description: On-chain features: pay-per-call, token launches, vanity wallets.

pages.title: Pay (x402)
pages.description: Pay-per-call gateway: invoke any x402-protocol paid API with a USDC micro-transaction.

pages.title: Pump.fun Stream
pages.description: Mint and trade pump.fun agent tokens on Solana. Live feed of every launch.

pages.title: Pump Live
pages.description: Real-time SSE feed of every pump.fun launch as it happens.

pages.title: Pump Dashboard
pages.description: Pump.fun trading desk: watchlists, scanner, quotes, portfolio, and live charts.

pages.title: Strategy Lab
pages.description: Build DCA and subscription strategies that trade on-chain on your behalf.

pages.title: Solana Vanity Wallet
pages.description: Grind a Solana address with a custom prefix using your browser's GPU.

pages.title: ETH Vanity (CREATE2)
pages.description: Grind a vanity smart-contract address using the ThreeWSFactory CREATE2 deployer on BSC.

sections.title: Agent Tools
sections.description: Manage, talk to, and deploy individual agents.

pages.title: Chat
pages.description: Talk to your agent. Voice, text, and tool-use in one interface.

pages.title: Agent Home
pages.description: Default landing for an agent instance — chat, embed, and remix actions.

pages.title: Agents Index
pages.description: Browse every registered agent on three.ws.

pages.title: My Agents
pages.description: Your private collection of agents and avatars. Requires sign-in.

pages.title: Reputation Explorer
pages.description: Inspect on-chain reputation scores and attestations for any agent.

pages.title: Sign in
pages.description: Sign in with email, GitHub, or a connected wallet.

pages.title: Create account
pages.description: Create a new three.ws account.

pages.title: Forgot password
pages.description: Request a password-reset email.

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.description: Your account dashboard: agents, avatars, payments, keys, MCP servers, monetization, billing.

pages.title: Dashboard · Wallets
pages.description: Manage connected and agent-managed wallets.

pages.title: Dashboard · Usage
pages.description: API call volume, x402 spend, and per-agent usage breakdowns.

pages.title: Dashboard · Storage
pages.description: Avatar storage modes (R2 vs IPFS) and pin management.

pages.title: Dashboard · Sessions
pages.description: Active sign-in sessions across devices.

pages.title: Dashboard · Actions
pages.description: Agent action history and approvals.

pages.title: Settings
pages.description: Account, profile, and notification settings.

pages.title: Docs
pages.description: Full documentation: SDKs, API reference, embedding, agent system, smart contracts.

pages.title: Docs · Quick Start
pages.description: Five-minute walkthrough: create an agent, embed it, get a paid call.

pages.title: Docs · Agent System
pages.description: How agents, avatars, skills, and memories fit together.

pages.title: Docs · ERC-8004
pages.description: Reference for the on-chain agent identity standard.

pages.title: Docs · Embedding
pages.description: Embed an agent via iframe, oEmbed, or the <agent-3d> web component.

pages.title: Docs · <agent-3d>
pages.description: Reference for the <agent-3d> custom element.

pages.title: Docs · MCP
pages.description: Expose your agent as an MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, and other clients.

pages.title: Docs · Skills
pages.description: Write, package, and monetize agent skills.

pages.title: Docs · Widgets
pages.description: Build and publish reusable chat and 3D widgets.

pages.title: Docs · API Reference
pages.description: Full HTTP API reference.

pages.title: Docs · SDK
pages.description: JavaScript / Node SDK for three.ws.

pages.title: Tutorials
pages.description: Step-by-step build guides.

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.description: How three.ws handles user data.

pages.title: Terms of Use
pages.description: Terms of service for three.ws.
